visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Animation introduction. A caricatured male character with a black beanie, goatee, and black shirt sits on a stool with arms crossed. He looks directly at the frame with a neutral, slightly smug expression. Behind him is a pale wood-paneled wall and a framed poster titled 'Meng & Chee'. (2) Scene shifts to a cartoon classroom. An elderly male teacher with gray hair and glasses stands behind a podium. A gray stone-like donation box with the characters for 'Donation' sits in the foreground. The lighting is bright and flat, typical of 2D animation. (3) The camera cuts between students in the classroom. One student in a brown shirt has wide, surprised eyes while another smiles. The teacher gestures with his hands while speaking to the class. The background consists of green chalkboards and classroom lockers. (4) The main character sits in his desk. A small blue winged creature (inner demon) with a striped hat appears floating above his head. The background darkens to a deep blue/gray to emphasize his internal conflict and thought process. (5) Confrontation phase. The main character stands up and points a finger aggressively. Other students appear in a montage behind him with angry, determined facial expressions and furrowed brows. Red-tinted frames are used to emphasize the intensity of the shouting. (6) The teacher is seen dragging the character by the head into the principal's office. The principal, a bald man in a striped shirt, looks on with a calm but judgmental expression. The setting features a certificate on the wall and a desk. (7) Return to the initial setup. The beanie-wearing character is back on his stool, talking to the audience. He smirks and crosses his arms again as the animated segment concludes. (8) Transition to live-action. A man (Namewee) is playing a ukulele while wearing a black and white striped beanie. The scene cuts to a hallway where a man in a business suit is talking on a phone, and another person in a red crab/clown costume interacts with people. The environment is a brightly lit, colorful indoor play center or museum.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 哈囉，我是Namewee 黃明志! (2) [Subtitle]: 今天我要來分享一則我童年的故事. (3) [Subtitle]: 在我初中的時候，班主任拿了一個捐款箱到我們班上. (4) [Subtitle]: 各位同學早，老師想請問一下各位家裡都開什麼車. (5) [Subtitle]: BMW, TOYOTA, Wakamoto. 那不是車. (6) [Subtitle]: 誰家裡開日產車或國產車的? (7) [Subtitle]: 這是學校為慈善團體舉辦的“樂捐活動”哦. (8) [Subtitle]: 什麼東西啦階級社會喔. (9) [Subtitle]: 樂捐就是要快樂的捐，不快樂的捐叫做搶劫. (10) [Slogan]: 黃明志最新專輯《小明與小志》正式上線! (11) [Subtitle]: 大人唱兒童歌...真實的世界. [Logo]: Adults singing reality through kids song...

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 animated main character, multiple animated students and faculty, 1 live-action male artist, and several live-action actors in the MV segment.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is an animated version of Namewee, wearing a black beanie and a black t-shirt. In the live-action section, the artist wears a striped beanie and a white graphic t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The animation includes a wooden-walled room, a classroom with lockers and a chalkboard, and a principal's office. The live-action part is a colorful, high-saturation indoor facility with signs and murals.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-arousal male narrator introducing himself. A bright, upbeat acoustic guitar and percussion rhythm plays in the background at 115 BPM. The vocal quality is crisp with high articulation clarity and moderate pitch variability. (2) A transition SFX (whoosh) leads into the story. The teacher's voice enters with a lower pitch and authoritative tone. A light, comedic underscore continues, maintaining a consistent major mode. Incidental room tone is minimal, suggesting studio production. (3) The dialogue between the teacher and multiple student voices is rapid. Student voices vary in pitch and timbre. Every shift in perspective is punctuated by a short, melodic stinger or impact sound effect to enhance the comedic timing. (4) An internal monologue scene features a high-pitched, squeaky vocal effect representing the 'inner demon.' The BGM ducks significantly, allowing the high-frequency vocal texture to dominate the spectral balance. (5) Loudness increases as the main character protests. The vocal arousal spikes to a level 8, with a dominant, assertive delivery. A sharp 'bang' SFX occurs during a visual transition, marking a significant acoustic discontinuity. (6) The principal's voice is introduced—it is calm, slightly nasal, and carries an ironic, downward intonation. The BGM remains steady, providing a cohesive emotional floor throughout the various character interactions. (7) A major transition occurs as the narration ends and the music swells. The acoustic guitar becomes more prominent, and a melodic singing vocal begins, signaling the start of a music video segment. (8) The final phase consists of a studio-mixed song with full vocal layers and rhythmic percussion. The spectral brightness is high, and the dynamics are compressed for a consistent broadcast-style output. No significant noise interference is detected.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Narrative Conflict -> Resolution -> Product Promotion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous animated story about a childhood school incident to engage the audience before transitioning into a music video to promote the artist's new album, 'Meng & Chee'. It blends social commentary with entertainment.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of the new album and a CTA indicating it is 'now online'.
endorsementObject: 黃明志最新專輯《小明與小志》

high_inference.freeDescribe: The transition from 2D animation to live-action MV footage serves as a strong hook-to-conversion pipeline for music promotion.
